speaker: Solen
text: Don't be afraid. You were brought here because you are needed. Both of you.

speaker: Mira
text: Both? Where's Ren? What did you do to him?

speaker: Solen
text: He lives. He is where he must be — as you are where you must be. Time separated you. Time will reunite you.

speaker: Solen
text: A guide. That is all you need to know for now. The bridge ahead — cross it, and you'll be one step closer to him.
